systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.subtitle: Manage global system configuration parameters
systemSettings.noMatches: No settings match the current search or filter.
systemSettings.searchPlaceholder: Search by key, description, or value
systemSettings.editDescription: Change the value for this system parameter
systemSettings.resyncDescription: Recalculate and update all credit package prices based on the current unit credit price setting. This will overwrite any manually set prices.

aiActionPolicy.title: AI Action Policies
aiActionPolicy.subtitle: Configure credit costs for each AI feature
aiActionPolicy.formulaPatternVariable: Total cost = base cost + unit cost x ceil(applied metric / unit size)
aiActionPolicy.explanationFixed: {{baseLabel}} is currently {{base}} QMC for each usage.
aiActionPolicy.explanationVariable: {{baseLabel}} is {{base}} QMC, {{unitLabelName}} is {{unit}} QMC, and {{sizeLabel}} is {{size}}. The system charges based on {{metric}}.
aiActionPolicy.editDescription: Update display name, description, status, and the credit formula for this action.
aiActionPolicy.formulaSummary: Each usage costs {{base}} QMC flat, plus {{unit}} QMC for every {{size}} {{mode}}. Partial units are rounded up.

generateQuiz.title: Generate Quiz
generateQuiz.description: Credit charged when generating a quiz with AI, based on total question count.

generateFlashcards.title: Generate Flashcards
generateFlashcards.description: Credit charged when generating flashcards with AI, based on total card count.

generateMockTest.title: Generate Mock Test
generateMockTest.description: Credit charged when generating a mock test with AI, based on total question count.
generateMockTest.metric: Total question count in the mock test

previewQuizStructure.title: Preview Quiz Structure
previewQuizStructure.description: Credit charged each time AI drafts a quiz structure preview before quiz generation.

generateRoadmapQuiz.title: Generate quiz in roadmap
generateRoadmapQuiz.description: Credit charged when generating a roadmap knowledge quiz, based on question count.

analyzeStudyProfileKnowledge.title: Analyze Study Profile Knowledge
analyzeStudyProfileKnowledge.description: Credit charged each time AI analyzes the study profile knowledge input.

suggestStudyProfileFields.title: Suggest Study Profile Fields
suggestStudyProfileFields.description: Credit charged each time AI suggests study profile fields.

suggestStudyProfileExamTemplates.title: Suggest Study Profile Exam Templates
suggestStudyProfileExamTemplates.description: Credit charged each time AI suggests or generates study profile exam templates.

validateStudyProfileConsistency.title: Validate Study Profile Consistency
validateStudyProfileConsistency.description: Credit charged each time AI validates study profile consistency.

processPdf.title: Process PDF
processPdf.description: Credit charged for PDF processing, based on total page count.

processImage.title: Process Image
processImage.description: Credit charged for image processing, fixed cost per upload.

processText.title: Process Text
processText.description: Credit charged for plain text processing, based on total word count.

processDocx.title: Process Word
processDocx.description: Credit charged for Word document processing, based on total word count.

processXlsx.title: Process Excel
processXlsx.description: Credit charged for Excel processing, based on populated cell count.

processPptx.title: Process PowerPoint
processPptx.description: Credit charged for PowerPoint processing, based on slide count.

processAudio.title: Process Audio
processAudio.description: Credit charged for audio processing, based on duration in seconds.

processVideo.title: Process Video
processVideo.description: Credit charged for video processing, based on duration in seconds.

dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back, here is what is happening today.
dashboard.superAdminDesc: Welcome to the Super Admin control center.
dashboard.revenueCommandDeckDesc: Track captured revenue, pending transactions, payment state, and the current plans or credit surface of QuizMateAI in one place.
dashboard.commandDeckDesc: A single operating surface for users, groups, plans, payments, RBAC, and AI audit activity across the system.
dashboard.loadError: Unable to load the admin dashboard.
dashboard.partialData: Some modules could not be loaded completely, so the dashboard is showing the available data only.
dashboard.systemSignalsDesc: Core signals for identities, groups, AI audit, and access structure in one dense board.
dashboard.accountMixDesc: See how identities, roles, and recent operating rhythm are distributed across the platform.
dashboard.recentGroupsDesc: Newest or most noticeable group spaces currently visible in the system.
dashboard.accessFabricDesc: System roles and permission density currently mapped across RBAC.
dashboard.aiCommandFeedDesc: Recent AI activity to track models, features, and token volume in one stream.
dashboard.paymentHealthDesc: Current transaction state across completed, pending, cancelled, and failed payments.
dashboard.catalogSurfaceDesc: Plans, credit packages, and current catalog readiness across QuizMateAI.
dashboard.actionDockDesc: Jump directly into the main operating surfaces of QuizMateAI from one navigation cluster.
dashboard.noGroups: No group data is available yet.
dashboard.noAiAudit: No recent AI audit entries were found.
dashboard.noPayments: No payment traffic has been recorded yet.
dashboard.revenueWindowDesc: See the recent completed revenue rhythm by day so peaks and drops are visible at a glance.
dashboard.revenueWindowYearDesc: Aggregate revenue across the 12 months of the selected year, excluding future periods.
dashboard.revenueWindowMonthDesc: See revenue by day within the selected month, up to today when the current month is selected.
dashboard.revenueWindowWeekDesc: See revenue by day within the selected week, up to today when the current week is selected.
dashboard.emptyRevenueWindow: No completed revenue has been recorded in the last 7 days.
dashboard.recentTransactionsDesc: Review the latest payments with status, billed target, method, and timestamp.
dashboard.methodMixDesc: Compare which payment methods currently drive the most transaction volume and value.
dashboard.monetizationSurfaceDesc: A compact view of plans, credit packs, transaction volume, and the sellable targets currently generating revenue.
dashboard.financeActionsDesc: Jump directly into payments, plan management, and credit packages without navigating through broader admin panels.

actionDescriptions.payments: Open the payment ledger to inspect status, amount, order IDs, and who was billed.
actionDescriptions.plans: Manage the plan catalog and publication status across the system.
actionDescriptions.creditPackages: Track the credit packages on sale and the credit supply surface offered to users.
actionDescriptions.aiAudit: Review AI calls, active models, and token consumption across recent operations.

form.title: Create New Admin
form.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
form.description: Create a new admin account. Open RBAC on each row to assign permissions.

errors.loadAdmins: Unable to load the admin list.

rbac.title: Permissions: {{username}}
rbac.description: Toggle permissions for ADMIN accounts. SUPER_ADMIN keeps full default access.
rbac.superAdminReadonly: SUPER_ADMIN accounts always have full default access.

adminPayments.desc: Look up transactions by order ID, user, workspace, or payment status.
adminPayments.permissionDenied: Your account does not have permission to view payment transactions.
adminPayments.expireDescription: Cancel all PENDING payments that have passed their expiry time. This action cannot be undone.

expireForm.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you are expiring these payments (for audit log).

detail.title: Payment Details {{orderId}}
detail.desc: Review the full transaction details and billed target information.

topicManagement.title: Topic & Field Management
topicManagement.desc: Create and organize topics with their fields.
topicManagement.fieldExists: This field already exists in the topic.

systemConfig.title: Learning Configuration
systemConfig.removedDesc: Domain, Knowledge, Scheme, and Level have been removed. Users configure directly via document description, level, and goals in Workspace.
systemConfig.description: Create and maintain domains, knowledge, schemes, and levels used across the platform.
systemConfig.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or status...
systemConfig.readDeniedDescription: Your account does not currently have permission to view learning configuration.

panels.knowledge: Knowledge items belong to a domain and define the base level system.
panels.scheme: Schemes belong to a knowledge item and can refine its evaluation model.
panels.level: Levels belong to a scheme or directly to a knowledge item.

placeholders.description: Add extra context or usage notes...

levelHints.selectParent: Choose a knowledge first to see which level model applies.
levelHints.scoreBased: SCORE_BASED: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.
levelHints.threeLevel: THREE_LEVEL: Levels are auto-created (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced). Edit if needed.

wizard.title: Create step by step
wizard.description: Follow Domain → Knowledge → Scheme → Level for logical flow.
wizard.step1Desc: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.step2Desc: Select domain and create knowledge. Level system type chosen here applies to scheme and level.
wizard.step3Desc: Scheme is optional. LevelSystemType is inherited from Knowledge and cannot be changed.
wizard.step4Desc: SCORE_BASED: enter scores. THREE_LEVEL: 3 default levels or custom 4-5 levels.
wizard.step1CreateOrSelect: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.levelSystemTypeHint: Scheme will inherit this type. To change, go back to step 2.
wizard.skipScheme: Skip Scheme (Level belongs directly to Knowledge)
wizard.customLevelNamesRequired: Please enter names for all levels.
wizard.scoreListHint: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.

dialogs.createDescription: Fill in the required fields to add a new item.
dialogs.editDescription: Update the item details and save your changes.
dialogs.deleteDescriptionDomainCascade: Deleting Domain {{name}} will permanently remove the Domain and all Knowledge, Scheme, and Level inside it. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

rbac.title: RBAC System
rbac.desc: Manage system roles and permissions - Role Based Access Control.
rbac.userRoleDesc: Shows only ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN accounts.
rbac.roleManagementDesc: Create custom roles, review permissions, and sync permissions by role.
rbac.userPermissionDesc: Assign roles and configure permissions for ADMIN accounts. SUPER_ADMIN keeps full default access.
rbac.createRoleDesc: Enter the new role name. The backend will normalize it to uppercase.
rbac.superAdminReadonlyDesc: SUPER_ADMIN always has all default permissions and cannot be edited manually.
rbac.syncRoleDesc: Choose the permissions applied to this role. This action syncs the full permission set for the role.

subscription.title: Subscription Management
subscription.desc: Manage subscription plans and user subscriptions.
subscription.addPlanDesc: Create a new subscription plan with pricing and features.
subscription.planDetailDesc: Detailed information about this subscription plan.
subscription.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the plan "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
subscription.planInUse: This plan has at least 1 user using it
subscription.defaultPlanExists: A default plan already exists for {{type}}. Only 1 INDIVIDUAL default and 1 GROUP default plan are allowed.

aiModels.title: AI Models by capability
aiModels.groupHint: Choose the default model for this capability in the selected plan.

scope.userPlanDescription: For individual accounts, onboarding, and solo learning flows.
scope.workspacePlanDescription: For team workspaces, collaboration, and shared resources.

wizard.dialogEditDescription: Edit the plan step by step so you do not need to scroll through the full configuration in one screen.
wizard.dialogCreateDescription: Create a new plan through a step-by-step flow that is easier to review before saving.
wizard.nextHint: Use the "Next" button to move through each step and keep the dialog compact.
wizard.finalHint: You are on the final step. Save now or jump back to any previous step to adjust.

basic.title: Basics
basic.description: Name the plan, choose its scope, and set the price.

models.title: AI models
models.description: Assign default models for each capability group.

review.title: Review
review.description: Inspect the final setup before saving.

basic.title: Set up the plan
basic.description: Start by defining the plan identity and scope.
basic.editingLocked: Code and scope stay locked while editing to avoid drifting from the active catalog.

fields.levelHint: A level can contain multiple plans, so choose the level that best fits this plan.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe who this plan is for and its main value.

entitlement.title: Entitlements and limits
entitlement.description: Keep this part compact: quantities first, then the capability toggles.
entitlement.maxIndividualWorkspaceHint: Maximum number of individual workspaces allowed by this plan.
entitlement.noneEnabled: No capabilities enabled for this plan yet.

models.title: Default models by capability
models.description: Each capability group should have a default model to reduce manual tuning at the end.
models.inactiveHint: Models outside the ACTIVE state still appear for historical review, but cannot be newly selected.
models.noAssignmentHint: No dedicated model assigned. The system will use the matching default resolution instead.

review.title: Review before saving
review.description: Final step to fine-tune action-level overrides when this plan needs distinct AI behavior.
review.aiOverridesHint: Leave empty to use the default capability model.
review.aiOverridesGroupHint: Only override when this plan truly needs behavior different from the group default model.
review.useDefaultHint: Leave empty to use the default for {{group}}.

aiModels.title: AI Model Catalog
aiModels.subtitle: Manage the system model catalog, activation state, and pricing versions per capability.
aiModels.empty: No models match the current filters.

stats.totalHint: Models stored in the system catalog
stats.assignedHint: Used by at least one plan

pricing.historyDescription: Track the active version and the pricing milestones stored for this model.
pricing.formDescription: Enter source pricing in USD or pull it from the official source, and the system will convert it to VND.
pricing.officialDescription: Auto-fetch input and output pricing from official OpenAI or Gemini pages when the model is supported.
pricing.officialUnsupported: This model does not currently support official auto pricing.
pricing.openEndedHint: Leave blank if this pricing version has no end date yet.

dialogs.createDescription: Add a new model so the system can assign it by capability and plan.
dialogs.editDescription: Update the display metadata and capability group for this model.
dialogs.pricingDescription: Manage model input/output pricing and sync it from official sources when needed.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? If the model has usage history, the backend will archive it instead of hard deleting it.

form.systemDefaultHint: Only used when a plan does not have a valid mapping or when legacy flows require a fallback.

aiCosts.title: AI Costs
aiCosts.subtitle: Separate what the user paid, the actual provider spend, and the margin kept on each AI request.
aiCosts.empty: No requests match the current filters.

filters.dialogDescription: Choose the conditions used to narrow the AI cost ledger.

detail.title: Request revenue & cost detail
detail.explainCharged: The user paid {{credit}} credits for this request, which equals {{vnd}}.
detail.explainProvider: The actual spend is derived from {{prompt}} input tokens and {{output}} output tokens, totaling about {{actualTokens}} tokens and {{cost}}.
detail.explainMargin: Profit is calculated as user-paid amount minus actual provider cost. The current value is {{profitVnd}}; a negative value means a loss.

aiAudit.title: AI Audit
aiAudit.description: Track AI requests, token usage, models, statuses, and open detailed traces when needed.

errors.loadLogs: Unable to load AI audit logs.

metrics.errorsHint: Errored requests matching the current filters

table.title: AI request list
table.empty: No AI audit logs match the current filters.

detail.title: AI request details
detail.apiKeyHint: The key is masked so the real secret is not exposed.
detail.missing: This request is no longer present in the current list. Close the dialog and refresh the list if needed.

aiProviders.providerHint: {{count}} models in catalog, {{active}} active and {{archived}} archived.

userPage.title: User Management
userPage.desc: Manage all users in the system.

userDetail.workspaceExplorerHeading: Audit everything stored inside the user's workspaces
userDetail.workspaceExplorerDesc: Open each workspace to inspect documents, roadmaps, quizzes, and the workspace setup snapshot in one coherent view.
userDetail.inspectHint: Open this workspace to inspect documents, roadmap items, quizzes, and the current setup snapshot.
userDetail.roadmapsDesc: Review roadmap sets currently attached to this workspace.
userDetail.documentsDesc: Study materials currently stored in this workspace.
userDetail.quizzesDesc: Quiz assets and generated assessments belonging to this workspace.
userDetail.profileDesc: Current learning setup, goal, and pacing configuration.
userDetail.workspaceSnapshotLoadError: Unable to load this workspace snapshot.

groupDetail.noDescription: This group does not have a detailed description yet.
groupDetail.commandCenterDesc: Monitor members, roadmaps, logs, and operating status in a dedicated group view.
groupDetail.groupPulseDesc: Core signals that show the current health of this group at a glance.
groupDetail.memberRosterDesc: See who leads, who contributes, and the current size of the group.
groupDetail.contentBoardDesc: Roadmaps and learning assets currently attached to the group workspace.
groupDetail.activityStreamDesc: The latest changes and events happening inside this group.
groupDetail.governanceDesc: Subscription status, leadership controls, and key group milestones.
groupDetail.emptyRoadmapsDesc: There are no roadmaps attached to this group yet.
groupDetail.emptyLogsDesc: Recent activity will appear here as soon as the group starts moving.
groupDetail.emptySubscriptionDesc: This group does not currently have an active subscription.
